title: Break-Even Calculator
description: Calculate the point where your total revenue equals total costs and find when your business becomes profitable

descriptions.fixedCosts: Costs that don't change with output (rent, salaries, etc.)
descriptions.variableCostPerUnit: Costs that change per product (materials, labor per unit)
descriptions.sellingPricePerUnit: Price at which you sell one unit
descriptions.targetUnits: Calculate profit at a specific number of units

results.title: Break-Even Analysis
results.note2: Each unit contributes towards fixed costs
results.note3: After break-even, each unit adds to profit
results.readyDesc: Enter your costs and pricing, then click calculate

errors.title: Cannot Calculate
errors.invalidInput: Please enter valid numbers for all fields
errors.priceTooLow: Selling price must be greater than variable cost per unit. No break-even possible.
